data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for multi-page forms with progress saving, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this feature. The lack of details regarding the multi-page functionality and progress saving leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Missing evidence of multi-page form implementation and progress saving functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for multi-page forms
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that multi-page forms can save progress and allow users to return later.
